title: Kill sound
description: Adds sound effects to your kills
body:
a sound will play after your kill a player

Only triggers on player-vs-player kills, not PvE
Sound only plays for you locally - other players don't hear it

Try different sounds for different moods - **_entity.wither.spawn_**  sounds epic for dramatic kills

If u want to add your sound look in **How to use it** 4.(if it didn't work then u need to choose between the basic)

## **Features**

Kill Detection: Automatically detects when you land the killing blow on another player

Customizable Sound: Choose from a variety of Minecraft sounds including level-up, orb pickup, dragon death, wither spawn, and more

Volume Control: Adjust the sound volume to your preference

Pitch Control: Fine-tune the pitch for a higher or lower sound
Enable/Disable Toggle: Turn the mod on or off without uninstalling

## **How to use**

1. Install the mod in your client/Minecraft mods folder
   
2. Launch Minecraft with Fabric loader
   
3. Play normally - the sound will automatically play when you kill another player
   
4. To customize settings, edit the config file located at: %appdata%/.minecraft/config/killsound.json

## **Config Options**

_/enabled_ : Set to true or false to enable/disable the mod

_/soundId_ : The sound to play (see list below)

_/volume_ : Sound volume from 0.0 to 1.0

_/pitch_ : Sound pitch from 0.5 to 2.0

## **Available Sounds**

_/entity.player.levelup_ - **Level up chime (default)**

_/random.orb_ - **Experience orb pickup**

_/entity.wither.death_ - **Wither death**

_/entity.wither.spawn_ - **Wither spawn**

_/ui.toast.challenge_complete_ - **Challenge complete fanfare**

_/entity.ender_dragon.death_ - **Ender dragon death**

_/entity.lightning_bolt.thunder_ - **Thunder**

_/entity.generic.explode_ - **Explosion**

_/entity.blaze.death_ - **Blaze death**

_/entity.ghast.death_ - **Ghast death**
